title: Shortcut - Collapse All Folders
excerpt: There is currently not a shortcut to collapse all folders in the workspace. All folders tend to open up when moving boards around. Currently needing to right click on a folder to collapse all or go into the Workspace ell…

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: There is currently not a shortcut to collapse all folders in the workspace. All folders tend to open up when moving boards around. Currently needing to right click on a folder to collapse all or go into the Workspace ellipsis then Sort Workspace to find the Collapse all folders button.

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml: i would even say having a default “collapsed” option is a good idea

posts.author: Andoni00 (Andoni)
posts.cookedHtml: Personally clicking on the three dots next to any folder and collapsing all folders is enough of a shortcut. I’d still love a default collapsed view setting (even if it’s at the workspace admin level).
